case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO VENTURA COUNTY** GABRIEL ESPINOZA VS. CBC GROUP, INC., NORDSTROM, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANTS CBC GROUP, INC., NORDSTROM, INC'S. MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO VENTURA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT" IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY THE TRANSFER COSTS. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANTS CBC GROUP, INC., NORDSTROM, INC's. MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' unopposed "motion to transfer venue to Ventura County Superior Court" is granted. Plaintiff is to pay the transfer costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
